zh.lifeSummary: 當Ebenezer Morris於1698年2月26日出生在美國康乃狄克州文達哈姆武德斯托可時，他的父親Ebenezer Morris33歲，母親Sarah Davis25歲。他於1725年4月15日與Sarah Killam在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1798年享年101歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ebenezer Morris于1698年2月26日出生在美国康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可时，他的父亲Ebenezer Morris33岁，母亲Sarah Davis25岁。他于1725年4月15日与Sarah Killam在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1798年享年101岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Mauritz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Armin, Frieda, Helmut, Kurt, Reinhold, Wolfgang.
German and Dutch: from the personal name Mauritz, from Latin Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: Mauricio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Mario, Roberto, Lilia, Luis, Adela, Andres, Antero, Cipriano.  Portuguese Manoel.
Portuguese (Maurício) and Spanish: from the personal name Maurício (Portuguese), Mauricio (Spanish), derived from the Latin name Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: Maurice
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Armand, Denys, Gabrielle, Antoine, Benoit, Camille, Cecile, Francois, Gaston, Germain.
French, English, Welsh, Scottish, and Irish: from the Old French personal name Maurice, Latin Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: McMorris
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muiris, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of Morris . In some cases this is a Gaelicized form of Fitzmaurice .
Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muirgheasa ‘son of Muirgheas’, a Gaelic personal name meaning ‘sea valor’ or ‘sea choice’. Compare Morrissey .

variants.name: Morici
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Gasper, Aldo, Angelo, Annamarie, Elvio, Giuseppe, Sal, Santo, Vito.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a variant of the personal name Maurice (see Morris ).
Hungarian: patronymic from the personal name Móric, Hungarian form of Morris .

variants.name: Moris
meanings: English: variant of   Morris  .

French, Luxembourgish, Flemish, Walloon, North German, and Dutch: from a vernacular form of the French personal name Maurice (see Morris ). In North America, the surname Moris may also be an altered form of French Maurice .
Americanized form of German   Moritz  .

variants.name: Merrick
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Meuric, the Middle Welsh form of Maurice (see Morris ).
Irish: borrowed from Welsh. In Ireland, when this is not the Welsh name, it might be adopted for Irish Ó Mearadhaigh, see Merry 2.

variants.name: Maurizio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Marcello, Marco, Mario, Fernando, Matteo, Natale, Sal, Valentino, Vito.
Italian: from the personal name Maurizio, from Latin Mauritius (see Morris 1).

variants.name: Morehouse
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the many places called Moorhouse in Yorkshire or Durham (from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūs ‘house’). In some cases the surname may have become Morris . This name is also established in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Ebenezer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a biblical place name (meaning ‘stone of help’ in Hebrew). This was the site of the battle where the Israelites were defeated by the Philistines (1 Samuel 4:1). After they took their revenge, Samuel set up a memorial stone bearing this name (1 Samuel 7:12). It was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 17th century, possibly after being misread in the Bible as a personal name, or else because of its favourable etymological connotations. It now has unfavourable connotations because of the miserly character of  Ebenezer Scrooge  in  Charles Dickens's  A Christmas Carol (  1843 ), but nevertheless is still occasionally used.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: British Forces Capture Fort Griswold
historicEvents.description: The capture of Fort Griswold was the final act of treason that Benedict Arnold committed. This would be a British victory. On the American side 85 were killed, 35 wounded and paroled, 28 taken prisoner, 13 escaped, and 1 twelve year old was captured and released.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of the Battle of Groton and The Burning of New London

en.lifeSummary: When Ebenezer Morris was born on 26 February 1698, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, United States, his father, Ebenezer Morris, was 33 and his mother, Sarah Davis, was 25. He married Sarah Killam on 15 April 1725, in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1798, at the age of 101.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ebenezer Morris est né le 26 février 1698, à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, Ebenezer Morris, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Sarah Davis, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Killam le 15 avril 1725, à Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé environ 1798, à l’âge de 101 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ebenezer Morris am 26. Februar 1698 in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ebenezer Morris 33 und seine Mutter Sarah Davis 25. Er hat am 15. April 1725 in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Killam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1798 im Alter von 101 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ebenezer Morris è nato il il 26 febbraio 1698 nel Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Ebenezer Morris, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Davis, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Killam il 15 aprile 1725, nel Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1798, all'età di 101 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ebenezer Morrisが1698年2月26日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックで生まれた時，父Ebenezer Morrisは33歳，母Sarah Davisは25歳であった。1725年4月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードエンフィールドでSarah Killamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1798年に101歳で死去した。

ko.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡

ko.Muddy River, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuse: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 무디 라이버
ko.Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드
ko.lifeSummary: Ebenezer Morris(이)가 1698년 2월 26일 미국 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ebenezer Morris(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Davis(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1725년 4월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드에서 Sarah Killam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1798년 101세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ebenezer Morris nasceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1698, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Ebenezer Morris, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Davis, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Killam em 15 de abril de 1725, em Enfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1798, com 101 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ebenezer Morris родился 26 февраля 1698 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Ebenezer Morris было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Davis, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Killam 15 апреля 1725 г. в местности энфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер около 1798 г. в возрасте 101 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ebenezer Morris nació el 26 de febrero de 1698, en Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, su papá, Ebenezer Morris, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Sarah Davis, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sarah Killam el 15 de abril de 1725, en Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1798, a la edad de 101 años.
